one_line: Last great Gupta emperor who held back the Alchon Huns as his empire strained at the edges.

appearance.age_look: Late 20s to early 30s, athletic and broad-shouldered with a disciplined soldier’s build.
appearance.face: Oval face with strong jaw, straight nose, medium brown North Indian complexion, a faint battle scar running diagonally across the left eyebrow, thick straight brows; default expression is calm, resolute focus with a hint of underlying weariness.
appearance.hair: Thick black hair worn in a high topknot (mundu-style) centered on the crown, sides and back neatly gathered; a narrow gold fillet-band with a small central lotus motif sits across the forehead, with a short black lock falling in front of the right ear.
appearance.costume: Era-accurate mid-5th century North Indian royal-heroic outfit: a fitted knee-length angarkha-style tunic in deep madder red cotton with fine gold border at collar, sleeve hems, and front overlap; over it a sleeveless, slightly shorter waistcoat in muted indigo with narrow geometric gold weave at the edges; lower body in a tightly wrapped white cotton dhoti with a broad golden-yellow border, pleated to the front and reaching mid-calf; a cream-colored cotton-silk uttariya (shawl) with thin red edging draped from the left shoulder across the torso and around the right forearm; bare feet in combat are avoided—he wears simple brown leather sandals with toe loop and heel strap; jewellery kept functional: small round gold kundala earrings, a single medium-thickness gold torque necklace, and a braided black armband on the right biceps; for battle, a plain iron breastplate shaped as a simple, slightly curved rectangular plate strapped over the tunic, and a broad leather belt with a small pouch at the left hip.
appearance.signature: A long, slightly curved iron sword (early talwar-type) with a plain steel blade, simple crossguard, oval iron pommel wrapped in dark brown leather, and a scabbard of dark brown leather with a narrow brass chape, worn slung from his left hip so the hilt angles forward.

ref_desc: Skandagupta is a medium-brown, strong-jawed North Indian man in his early 30s with a high black topknot and gold fillet, wearing a deep red angarkha, indigo waistcoat, white-gold dhoti, cream uttariya, minimal gold jewellery, and carrying a long curved iron sword in a brown leather scabbard.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Skandagupta, last great Gupta emperor: a late-20s to early-30s athletic North Indian man with an oval face, strong jaw, medium brown complexion, straight nose, thick brows, and a faint scar over his left eyebrow, his default expression calm and resolute with a hint of fatigue. His thick black hair is tied in a high topknot on the crown, sides and back neatly gathered, with a narrow gold band across his forehead bearing a small lotus at the center and a short lock of hair falling in front of his right ear. He wears a deep madder-red knee-length angarkha-style tunic with a fitted torso, side-tied overlap, and fine gold borders at the collar, sleeve hems, and front edge, over which sits a sleeveless muted indigo waistcoat ending just above the tunic hem, edged with narrow geometric gold weave. His lower body is clad in a tightly wrapped white cotton dhoti with a broad golden-yellow border, pleated in front and ending mid-calf, and a cream cotton-silk uttariya shawl with thin red edging drapes from his left shoulder across his torso and around his right forearm. Add simple brown leather sandals with toe loop and heel strap, a plain iron breastplate strapped over the tunic for battle, a broad leather belt with a small pouch at his left hip, small round gold earrings, a single gold torque necklace, and a braided black armband on his right biceps. His signature weapon is a long, slightly curved iron sword with a plain steel blade, simple crossguard, oval iron pommel wrapped in dark brown leather, and a dark brown leather scabbard with brass tip, worn at his left hip so the hilt angles forward; show the sword clearly. Use a palette dominated by deep red, indigo, white, golden yellow, and brown leather tones, and present him from multiple angles to clearly show face, hair, costume, and sword design.
